raw_consumer_statement: On XXXX XX/XX/XXXX, I notified by Citibank and ask if I made a XXXX transaction? No I did not, my account balance was XXXX, I sent a payment of {$1000.00} dollars which would give me a credit of {$700.00}. After I checked my online app on XXXX XX/XX/XXXX I found that I had Multiple fraudulent charges and I immediately attempted to close this account. I was not able to as someone else had access to my account and had changed my Email address and password. Citibank not knowing my account had been compromised on their end send out another card with different account number. This card was compromised before I even received it!! they attempted to send me out another card and number but, I requested my account be closed and the entire account be placed under investigation?? I was under the assumption this had been started on Citibank 's end? Only to find out in late XX/XX/XXXX that this issue was not started and my {$700.00} Credit was lost? stolen? not there in my account? and no one could find it from Citibank Fraud department?? I have made over XXXX phone calls to Citibank from XX/XX/XXXX until last night XXXX XX/XX/XXXX and still nothing has been done and I spend on a average of XXXX hrs on each call due to being transferred over 7 times each call.
